g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does app/main.py do in the GSE scraper?')
sendPrompt('How is logging configured in the GSE scraper?')
sendPrompt('How does gse_scraper.py fetch data from the GSE website?')
sendPrompt('What does pipeline.py orchestrate in the GSE scraper?')
sendPrompt('How does the APScheduler cron work in the GSE scraper?')
sendPrompt('What alerts does alerting.py send in the GSE scraper?')
sendPrompt('What does database.py set up in the GSE scraper?')
sendPrompt('What SQLAlchemy models does the GSE scraper use?')
sendPrompt('What query methods are in repositories.py?')
sendPrompt('How does the cache_response decorator work?')
sendPrompt('What Pydantic schemas does the GSE scraper use?')
sendPrompt('What routes are in scraper.py endpoint?')
